khuzayma.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: 'Cleanliness is half of faith, and Al-Hamdu Lillah (all praise and gratitude belong to Allah) fills the scale.'
khuzayma.arabicText: عَنْ أَبِي مَالِكٍ الْأَشْعَرِيِّ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ الطُّهُورُ شَطْرُ الْإِيمَانِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ تَمْلَأُ الْمِيزَانَ

khuzayma.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'When any one of you performs ablution (wudu) and performs it well, then goes to the mosque, he is in prayer as long as he is intending to pray.'
khuzayma.arabicText: إِذَا تَوَضَّأَ أَحَدُكُمْ فَأَحْسَنَ الْوُضُوءَ ثُمَّ خَرَجَ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ فَلَا يَزَالُ فِي صَلَاةٍ مَا كَانَ يَعْمِدُ إِلَى الصَّلَاةِ

khuzayma.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'The key to prayer is purification, its opening is Takbir (saying Allahu Akbar), and its conclusion is Taslim (saying As-Salamu Alaykum).'
khuzayma.arabicText: مِفْتَاحُ الصَّلَاةِ الطُّهُورُ وَتَحْرِيمُهَا التَّكْبِيرُ وَتَحْلِيلُهَا التَّسْلِيمُ

hibban.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: 'Actions are but by intentions, and every man shall have only that which he intended.'
hibban.arabicText: إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى

hibban.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'The most perfect of believers in faith are those who are the best in character, and the best of you are those who are best to their wives.'
hibban.arabicText: أَكْمَلُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ إِيمَانًا أَحْسَنُهُمْ خُلُقًا وَخِيَارُكُمْ خِيَارُكُمْ لِنِسَائِهِمْ

hibban.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: 'Avoid jealousy, for indeed jealousy devours good deeds just as fire devours wood.'
hibban.arabicText: إِيَّاكُمْ وَالْحَسَدَ فَإِنَّ الْحَسَدَ يَأْكُلُ الْحَسَنَاتِ كَمَا تَأْكُلُ النَّارُ الْحَطَبَ

hakim.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'I am leaving among you two weighty things, which if you hold fast to, you will never go astray after me: the Book of Allah and my Sunnah.'
hakim.arabicText: تَرَكْتُ فِيكُمْ أَمْرَيْنِ لَنْ تَضِلُّوا مَا تَمَسَّكْتُمْ بِهِمَا كِتَابَ اللَّهِ وَسُنَّةَ نَبِيِّهِ

hakim.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'A scholar who teaches people good but forgets himself is like a candle that gives light to others while burning itself up.'
hakim.arabicText: مَثَلُ الْعَالِمِ الَّذِي يُعَلِّمُ النَّاسَ الْخَيْرَ وَيَنْسَى نَفْسَهُ كَمَثَلِ السِّرَاجِ يُضِيءُ لِلنَّاسِ وَيَحْرِقُ نَفْسَهُ

hakim.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: 'Indeed, Allah does not look at your appearances or your wealth, but He looks at your hearts and your deeds.'
hakim.arabicText: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يَنْظُرُ إِلَى صُوَرِكُمْ وَأَمْوَالِكُمْ وَلَكِنْ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى قُلُوبِكُمْ وَأَعْمَالِكُمْ

razzaq.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'Whoever does not thank people does not thank Allah.'
razzaq.arabicText: مَنْ لَا يَشْكُرُ النَّاسَ لَا يَشْكُرُ اللَّهَ

razzaq.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'Make things easy and do not make them difficult, give glad tidings and do not repel people.'
razzaq.arabicText: يَسِّرُوا وَلَا تُعَسِّرُوا وَبَشِّرُوا وَلَا تُنَفِّرُوا

ibnabishayba.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: 'Every good deed is charity, and indeed it is a good deed to meet your brother with a smiling face.'
ibnabishayba.arabicText: كُلُّ مَعْرُوفٍ صَدَقَةٌ وَإِنَّ مِنَ الْمَعْرُوفِ أَنْ تَلْقَى أَخَاكَ بِوَجْهٍ طَلْقٍ

ibnabishayba.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'He is not one of us who does not show mercy to our young ones and recognize the honor of our elders.'
ibnabishayba.arabicText: لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ لَمْ يَرْحَمْ صَغِيرَنَا وَيَعْرِفْ شَرَفَ كَبِيرِنَا

daraqutni.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'Let there be no harm inflicted nor reciprocated in Islam.'
daraqutni.arabicText: لَا ضَرَرَ وَلَا ضِرَارَ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ

daraqutni.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: 'Purification is the key to prayer, its entering is the Takbir, and its leaving is the Taslim.'
daraqutni.arabicText: مِفْتَاحُ الصَّلَاةِ الطُّهُورُ وَتَحْرِيمُهَا التَّكْبِيرُ وَتَحْلِيلُهَا التَّسْلِيمُ

bayhaqi.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: 'I was sent only to perfect noble character.'
The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'Faith has over seventy branches, the highest of which is saying Lailaha Illallah, and the lowest is removing a harmful obstacle from the road.'
bayhaqi.arabicText: الْإِيمَانُ بِضْعٌ وَسَبْعُونَ شُعْبَةً فَأَفْضَلُهَا قَوْلُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَدْنَاهَا إِمَاطَةُ الْأَذَى عَنِ الطَّرِيقِ

nasai_kubra.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said: 'Indeed, Allah loves that when one of you performs a deed, they do it with excellence (itqan).'
nasai_kubra.arabicText: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ إِذَا عَمِلَ أَحَدُكُمْ عَمَلًا أَنْ يُتْقِنَهُ

nasai_kubra.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said: 'A Muslim is the one from whose tongue and hand other Muslims are safe.'
nasai_kubra.arabicText: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ

hisn.text: Dua upon waking up: 'Praise is to Allah Who gave us life after He had caused us to die, and unto Him is the resurrection.'
hisn.arabicText: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ

hisn.text: Dua when entering the Mosque: 'In the Name of Allah, and peace and blessings be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, open for me the gates of Your mercy.'
hisn.arabicText: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ

hisn.text: Dua when leaving the Mosque: 'In the Name of Allah, and peace and blessings be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, I ask You from Your favor.'
hisn.arabicText: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَالصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
